sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_lines (id UInt32, geometry MultiLineString) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_lines (id, geometry) VALUES (1, readWKTMultiLineString('MULTILINESTRING ((1 1, 2 2), (3 3, 4 4))'));
UPDATE geo_lines SET geometry = readWKTMultiLineString('MULTILINESTRING ((5 5, 6 6), (7 7, 8 8))') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, geometry FROM geo_lines WHERE geometry = readWKTMultiLineString('MULTILINESTRING ((1 1, 2 2), (3 3, 4 4))');
SELECT count(*) FROM geo_lines WHERE geometry IS NOT NULL;
